companies.name: BIG - Bjarke Ingels Group
companies.ai_summary: BIG (Bjarke Ingels Group) is a globally renowned Danish architecture firm known for its innovative, large-scale projects spanning architecture, urbanism, and design across residential, commercial, and cultural sectors. With offices in Copenhagen, New York, London, and beyond, the firm employs hundreds of staff and regularly undertakes high-profile, complex commissions worldwide. Given their volume of ambitious projects and strong emphasis on compelling visual storytelling, BIG represents a strong potential client for outsourced architectural visualization, particularly for competition submissions, client presentations, and marketing materials.

companies.name: Hansel Stone
companies.ai_summary: Hansel Stone is a UK-based luxury bathware brand (registered in Glasgow, Scotland) that manufactures and sells freestanding stone baths, basins, shower trays, and countertops made from mineral composite. They operate primarily as a direct-to-consumer e-commerce retailer and also have a trade programme (HanselPRO) targeting bathroom installers, designers, and developers. As a product/retail company rather than an architecture, design, or visualization studio, they have minimal overlap with the core client base of an architectural visualization studio — they do not produce property developments or architectural projects that would require 3D rendering services.

campaigns.subject: Elevating BIG's Architectural Vision with Studio-Quality 3D Renders
campaigns.body:
Hi BIG Team,

I've long admired how Bjarke Ingels Group pushes the boundaries of architecture — your projects consistently blend bold vision with human-centered design, and that's genuinely inspiring.

I'm Milad, founder of Armila Design, a Madrid-based 3D architectural visualization studio. We specialize in exterior and interior renders that bring complex architectural concepts to life — particularly in Minimalist and Modern Organic styles that align beautifully with BIG's aesthetic language.

We work with architecture firms and developers using Blender, 3ds Max, and AI-assisted rendering tools to deliver visuals that are both technically precise and emotionally compelling — exactly what iconic projects deserve.

If your Copenhagen team ever needs visualization support for pitches, publications, or client presentations, I'd love to explore how we could collaborate.

Would a quick portfolio share make sense as a starting point?

Warm regards,
Milad Rostami | Armila Design | armiladesign.com

campaigns.subject: 3D Visualization Support for BIG's Bold Projects
campaigns.body:
Hi BIG Team,

I've long admired how Bjarke Ingels Group pushes architecture into genuinely new territory — from Copenhagen's rooftops to projects reshaping skylines worldwide.

I'm Milad, founder of Armila Design, a Madrid-based architectural visualization studio. We create high-quality exterior and interior renders using Blender, 3ds Max, and AI-assisted rendering tools, with a style that leans toward clean, contemporary aesthetics — something that pairs well with BIG's design language.

Whether you need visualization support during concept pitches, client presentations, or competition entries, we'd love to contribute to your workflow as a reliable creative partner.

Would you be open to a quick look at our portfolio? I'd be happy to share recent work relevant to your scale of projects.

Warm regards,
Milad Rostami | Armila Design | armiladesign.com

campaigns.subject: 3D Visualization Support for BIG's Architectural Projects
campaigns.body:
Dear BIG Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm Milad Rostami, founder of Armila Design, a Madrid-based architectural visualization studio specializing in high-quality 3D renderings for architecture firms and real estate developers.

Having followed BIG's remarkable work across Copenhagen and globally, I believe our visualization capabilities could complement your project pipeline — particularly for client presentations, competition submissions, or marketing materials.

We offer exterior and interior visualization using Blender, 3ds Max, and AI-assisted rendering tools, with a strong focus on minimalist and modern organic aesthetics that align well with BIG's design language.

I'd welcome the opportunity to share our portfolio and explore whether there's a meaningful fit for collaboration.

Warm regards,
Milad Rostami | Armila Design | armiladesign.com

campaigns.subject: 3D Visualization Support for BIG's Architectural Projects
campaigns.body:
Dear BIG Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm Milad Rostami, founder of Armila Design, a Madrid-based architectural visualization studio specializing in high-quality 3D rendering for residential and commercial projects.

BIG's reputation for bold, human-centered architecture is well regarded across the industry, and I believe our visualization work could complement your presentation and development pipeline. We work with tools including Blender, 3ds Max, and AI-assisted rendering platforms to deliver exterior and interior visuals with precision and aesthetic clarity.

Whether supporting concept presentations, client approvals, or marketing materials, Armila Design brings both technical depth and a refined visual sensibility to every project.

I would welcome the opportunity to share our portfolio and explore whether there is a fit with your studio's needs. Would a brief conversation be possible at your convenience?

Warm regards,
Milad Rostami | Armila Design | armiladesign.com

daily_tasks.description: ارسال ایمیل معرفی به BIG - Bjarke Ingels Group — یک ایمیل حرفه‌ای و شخصی‌سازی‌شده برای تیم BIG در دانمارک آماده و ارسال کن. روی پروژه‌های مسکونی و تجاری مشترک تمرکز کن و نمونه‌کارهای مرتبط از سبک مدرن ارگانیک را پیوست کن. لینک وب‌سایت armiladesign.com را حتماً درج کن.

بررسی و تکمیل پروفایل MIR Visualization و Zaha Hadid — دو شرکت MIR Visualization و Zaha Hadid Architects هنوز خلاصه‌ای ندارند. اطلاعات هر دو را از وب‌سایت رسمی‌شان استخراج کن، خلاصه کوتاهی بنویس و در CRM ذخیره کن تا آماده ارسال ایمیل بشن.

تحقیق درباره پروژه‌های اخیر Zaha Hadid Architects — آخرین پروژه‌های معرفی‌شده توسط Zaha Hadid Architects در بریتانیا را بررسی کن. ببین در کدام حوزه‌ها (مسکونی، تجاری، فرهنگی) فعال‌ترند و چه نوع ویژوالایزیشنی ممکنه برای اونا جذاب باشه. این اطلاعات رو برای شخصی‌سازی ایمیل استفاده کن.

ارسال ایمیل همکاری به MIR Visualization — برای MIR Visualization در نروژ یک ایمیل B2B آماده کن با تمرکز بر همکاری استودیو به استودیو. از توانایی Armila در استفاده از ابزارهای هوش مصنوعی مثل NewArc.ai و Vaethat به عنوان مزیت رقابتی یاد کن و پیشنهاد همکاری در پروژه‌های مشترک بده.

به‌روزرسانی وضعیت لیدها در CRM پس از ارسال ایمیل‌ها — بعد از ارسال ایمیل‌های امروز، وضعیت هر سه شرکت را در CRM از 'new' به 'sent' تغییر بده. تاریخ ارسال، نوع محتوای ایمیل و نمونه‌کارهای پیوست‌شده را در یادداشت‌ها ثبت کن تا پیگیری بعدی راحت‌تر باشه.

Send introductory outreach email to MIR Visualization — Compose and send a personalized cold outreach email to MIR Visualization in Norway. Highlight Armila Design's expertise in high-end CGI and mention shared interest in photorealistic architectural visualization. Reference their portfolio style and propose a potential collaboration or subcontracting opportunity. Keep tone professional and concise.

Send tailored pitch email to Zaha Hadid Architects — Draft and send a targeted outreach email to Zaha Hadid Architects in the UK. Emphasize Armila Design's capability to handle complex parametric and organic architectural forms using Blender and 3ds Max. Attach 2-3 relevant portfolio pieces that showcase modern organic and minimalist styles. Position Armila as a reliable visualization partner for upcoming projects.

Review and complete missing CRM summaries for 2 leads — Open the CRM and locate the 2 leads flagged as missing summary. Research each company online, review their website, recent projects, and social media presence. Write a concise 3-5 sentence summary for each lead covering their services, typical project scale, and potential fit with Armila Design. Update the CRM records accordingly to move them out of the missing summary status.

Follow up on the 1 sent email with no reply — Locate the outreach email that was sent and has received no reply. Draft a short, friendly follow-up message referencing the original email and adding a new value point such as a recent portfolio update or relevant project example. Keep it under 5 sentences. Send the follow-up and update the CRM status and last contact date for that lead.

Review BIG - Bjarke Ingels Group Profile Before Outreach — Go to armiladesign.com CRM and open the BIG profile (score: 80). Study their recent projects, visual style, and CGI needs. Identify 1-2 specific projects where Armila's Warm Minimalism or Modern Organic style could add value. Use this to personalize your outreach email today.

Send Cold Outreach Email to BIG - Bjarke Ingels Group — Write and send a personalized cold email to BIG's visualization or marketing team. Reference a specific BIG project, highlight Armila's expertise in exterior/interior visualization using Blender and AI tools like NewArc.ai, and attach 2-3 portfolio images matching their aesthetic. Keep it under 150 words and include a clear CTA to schedule a call or view armiladesign.com.

Send Cold Outreach Email to MIR Visualization — Draft and send a targeted email to MIR Visualization in Norway positioning Armila as a skilled CGI subcontracting partner. Mention shared tools (3ds Max, AI rendering) and offer to handle overflow residential or commercial visualization projects. Keep the tone collaborative rather than competitive and link to armiladesign.com portfolio.

Research Zaha Hadid Architects CGI Requirements and Contacts — Spend 30 minutes researching Zaha Hadid Architects' current active projects, their preferred visualization vendors, and the right contact person (Head of Visualization, Marketing Director, or Project Architect). Check LinkedIn and their website. Document findings in the CRM profile to prepare a highly targeted email for tomorrow.

Complete Missing Summaries for 2 CRM Profiles — Two company profiles in the CRM are flagged as missing summaries. Open each profile and write a 3-5 sentence summary covering: what the company does, why they are a good fit for Armila, suggested outreach angle, and recommended Armila style or service to highlight. This will make future emails faster and more targeted.
